description:
Stream music from your Subsonic or Navidrome server Resonance is a music player for self-hosted, Subsonic-compatible servers such as Navidrome. Connect to your server and stream your own library. Features
  • Stream music from any Subsonic or Navidrome server
  • Browse artists, albums, and playlists
  • A home screen of recently played, newest, most played, and random albums
  • Play, pause, skip, seek, shuffle, repeat, and a play queue
  • Background playback with a notification and lock-screen controls
  • Search artists, albums, and songs
  • Star songs and browse your favorites
  • Synced and plain-text lyrics with auto-scroll
  • Scrobble played tracks back to your server
  • Several color themes
Built with Jetpack Compose and Material Design 3. Resonance is free software licensed under the GNU GPLv3, with no proprietary dependencies, no tracking, and no advertising.
